desc-default: Here you'll find practical work designed to get to grips with course concepts, projects carried out for professional or academic purposes, as well as more personal ones, for experimentation.
panel-nav1-intro: The practical exercises presented in this section aim to highlight the technical side of cyberattacks and break them down.
item1-1-desc: How long do you think your password will hold up?
panel-nav2-intro: Work carried out as part of assignments or during professional experience
item2-1-desc: IT asset management with GLPI, high availability using HaProxy, and SSL security.
item2-2-desc: Integration of a client company into Active Directory, PowerShell scripts, GPO and iSCSI file server.
item2-3-desc: Packet Tracer network mock-up and VirtualBox virtual prototype for the Chasseneuil shared workspace.
panel-nav3-intro: Personal notes and infrastructure set up for testing purposes or to improve one's working environment. Exploring office software
item3-1-desc: Time to build a small infrastructure to lighten the load on my computer, given the machines I'm going to virtualise. I also need to factor in the physical distance constraint, since I'll be moving around a lot during my work-study programme
item3-2-title: Looking for an alternative to MS Office
